## Description
Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. 

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Documentation update (README, FAQ, etc.)
- [ ] Translation added
- [ ] Bug fix in automation scripts
- [ ] License text suggestion (Must have discussed in an issue first)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code/docs follow the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have tested my changes (if applicable).
- [ ] I have updated the `CHANGELOG.md` accordingly.
